title: Homer is a small city on Kachemak Bay, on Alaska's Kenai Peninsula — beach waves and Kenai Mountains
description: Wind-driven waves breaking on a gravel beach at Homer with the Kenai Mountains rising across Kachemak Bay under broken cumulus clouds. A typical afternoon view illustrating the bay's wind-chop conditions.
alt: Windy afternoon with waves breaking on a Homer gravel beach and the Kenai Mountains across Kachemak Bay
